channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran says no final conclusion yet as Trump touts war-ending deal
item.description: Iran stated Friday it has not reached a final conclusion on a deal to end the war, despite President Trump announcing an agreement would be reached.

item.title: Video captures massive explosions destroying multiple homes
item.description: The blasts in Clinton Township, Pennsylvania, destroyed at least two homes and injured three people, including an 84-year-old woman.

item.title: Secret Service says UFC security at White House will match Super Bowl levels
item.description: As UFC fans gather in Washington, D.C., for Freedom 250 and related events, the Secret Service says security will be extremely tight.

item.title: Europol warns children are being recruited as criminals on an 'industrial scale'
item.description: Europol says children are being recruited as criminals on an industrial scale, posing the single greatest threat to Europe and the world.
